si_library.title: Customs and Excise (Import Control Regulations)
si_library.description: Regulates import licences and permits for controlled goods entering Zimbabwe. Lists goods requiring import licence, licensing authorities and application procedures.

si_library.title: Customs and Excise (Customs Border Control Area) Regulations
si_library.description: Establishes requirements for Customs Border Control Area (CBCA) compliance. Goods with FOB value exceeding USD 1,000 and certain scheduled goods require CBCA clearance.
key_provisions: 4th Schedule goods always require CBCA regardless of value
Non-compliance results in seizure of goods

si_library.title: Customs and Excise (Surtax) Regulations
si_library.description: Imposes additional surtax on selected imported goods to protect domestic industries. Applies to textiles, clothing, footwear, certain electronics, and agricultural products.

si_library.title: Control of Goods (Import and Export) (Prohibition) Order
si_library.description: Prohibits importation and exportation of specified goods. Includes absolute prohibitions on military weapons, counterfeit currency, hazardous waste and other dangerous goods.

si_library.title: Control of Goods (Restriction) Regulations
si_library.description: Restricts importation and exportation of goods requiring special permits. Includes firearms, explosives, certain chemicals, drugs, and strategic minerals.

si_library.title: Minerals Marketing Corporation (Export Permits) Regulations
si_library.description: Requires export permits for all minerals and mineral products. Administered by the Minerals Marketing Corporation of Zimbabwe (MMCZ). Includes gold, diamonds, platinum, chrome, lithium and other strategic minerals.

si_library.title: Control of Goods (Motor Vehicle Import Restrictions) Regulations
si_library.description: Restricts importation of second-hand motor vehicles beyond specified age limits. Right-hand drive requirement. Engine capacity restrictions for certain vehicle types.
key_provisions: All vehicles must be right-hand drive
Electric vehicles: exempt from age restriction

si_library.title: Customs and Excise Act (Chapter 23:02)
si_library.description: Principal legislation governing customs and excise in Zimbabwe. Provides the legal framework for import/export duties, customs procedures, and enforcement.

si_library.title: Value Added Tax (Amendment) Regulations
si_library.description: Amends VAT rate applicable to customs duty-inclusive values. Standard VAT rate is 14.5% applicable on the sum of CIF value, customs duty, surtax and any excise duty.

si_library.title: Customs and Excise (Tariff) Regulations (Amendment)
si_library.description: Updates the tariff schedule with revised duty rates for various HS code chapters. Reflects Zimbabwe's obligations under SADC, COMESA and bilateral trade agreements.

si_library.title: SADC Trade Protocol
si_library.description: Southern African Development Community Trade Protocol providing preferential tariff rates for goods originating in SADC member states with valid Certificate of Origin (CO).

si_library.title: COMESA Common External Tariff
si_library.description: Common Market for Eastern and Southern Africa preferential tariff rates for goods originating in COMESA member states with valid Certificate of Origin.
